items.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
items.dek: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

items.title: Australia probes mystery space balls that washed up on beach
items.dek: Officials are searching for the origins of six pieces of space debris discovered on Forrest Beach in Queensland.
items.body: Officials are searching for the origins of six pieces of space debris discovered on Forrest Beach in Queensland.
